score_rationale: Adequate relevance to e-commerce 996 profile (27yo, 12000 income, promoted to team lead). Good specificity (social spending 2174 yuan at 22%, 13 late-night meals, 4% healthy eating, front-half 7337 vs back-half 2390 yuan). Cross-domain patterns are reasonable but somewhat formulaic (social-finance-health triangle, reading as compensation, front/back structural imbalance). The model identifies the promotion-driven socializing pressure but doesn't deeply explore how the role change specifically altered behavior. Recommendations follow a visible template pattern (breakfast enforcement, consumption firewall, reading strategy shift) that reduces perceived personalization.
